Localization.Description: Possible dumping of user credentials is detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} may have dumped credentials after gaining access to object {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} may have dumped credentials with the PowerShell cmdlet {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} may have dumped credentials with the process {object.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
